description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the haskell:8.2 Docker image. Set a STACK_ROOT variable to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.stack and define a cache for .stack-work and .stack with untracked files. Include a before_script that runs stack upgrade, apt-get update, and apt-get install make xz-utils. Define two stages, build and test. Add a src_build job in the build stage that runs stack build, and a src_test job in the test stage that runs stack test, with no additional services, artifacts, or rules.
